action: Cycle pipeline ships code that CI then rejects on `gofmt -s` (simplify) diff: cycle-276 ship 5908efcd went red on the go workflow's vet+fmt step because go/internal/bridge/faketmux_amplify_test.go is gofmt-clean but not gofmt -s-clean — the in-cycle gates (commit-gate runner AND whatever fmt check the cycle ship class runs) check plain gofmt while CI checks gofmt -s. This is a recurring class (same mismatch noted 2026-06-05 for the interactive commit-gate). Fix direction: every fmt gate in the repo (commit-gate-runner.sh go lane, cycle ship gate, any EGPS fmt predicate) must run `gofmt -s -l` to match .github/workflows go vet+fmt exactly — one fmt contract, projected everywhere (single-source rule). Acceptance: a file that is gofmt-clean but not gofmt -s-clean (e.g. map[string]bool{...} composite literal simplifiable, or x[a:len(x)] slice) is BLOCKED by the commit gate and by the cycle ship path before push; add a regression test pinning gofmt -s as the gate's check.
evidence_pointer: gh run on 5908efcd: go workflow vet+fmt 'FAIL: gofmt diff' (ubuntu+macos); gofmt -s -l → go/internal/bridge/faketmux_amplify_test.go; prior instance: memory feedback_git_add_explicit_paths note 'commit-gate gofmt ≠ CI gofmt -s'
